Notice Of Motion To Set Motion For Summary Judgment Hearing Within 30 Days Of Trial
Off Calendar Jun-29-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT WAFERGEN BIO-SYSTEMS INC. Motion to Set Motion for Summary Judgment Hearing Within 30 Days of Trial. Gregory S. Cavallo, Esq. of Shopoff & Cavallo LLP (415) 984-1975 appearing for Plaintiff; Oliver Q. Dunlap, Esq. of Filice Brown (510) 444-3131 appearing for Defendant and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is denied. Defendant to seek a trial continuance. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Notice Of Moiton To Quash Deft'S Deposition Subpoenas To Third Parties For Production Of Business Records, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-29-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Gregory S. Cavallo, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: VIDA COMMUNICATION, INC.
Oliver Q. Dunlap, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Wafergen Bio-Systems Inc.

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF VIDA COMMUNICATION, INC.'s Motion To Quash Defendant's Deposition Subpoenas To Third Parties For Production Of Business Records is granted as the documents styled as subpoenas did not comply with C.R.C 1.31(a) or C.C.P. Section 1985(b). All requests for sanctions are denied. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Gregory S. Cavallo, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Vida Communication, Inc.
Oliver D. Dunlap, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Waferger Bio-Systems Inc.

After hearing, Plaintiff Vida Communication, Inc.'s Application for right to attach order and order for issuance of writ of attachment is Denied without prejudice. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
